title: fast admin check may return success in the presence of inconsistency
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t ( id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, PRIMARY KEY (id) );

INSERT INTO t (id, name, created_at, is_active) VALUES (1, 'ProductA', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00', TRUE), (2, 'ProductB', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 13:30:00', NULL), (3, 'ProductC', TIMESTAMP '2023-10-03 14:45:00', FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE is_active IS NULL OR created_at > TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 00:00:00';
key_bug_features: fast admin check returns success despite data inconsistency
